series_metadata.series_title: Driver Exam Station and Commercial Driver Examination Station Sign-In
series_metadata.series_description: To record the names of persons contacting a DX station in person for a driver license examination. (BMV 5804 Driver Examination Station Sign-In and BMV 5806 Commercial Driver License Examiner Log).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) years current, and ; Electronic: two (2) years current, and
